---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a change to the library, scripts, or docs.
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## What's the problem?
What are you trying to do today that's awkward, missing, or unclear?

## Proposed change
What would the smallest version of the fix look like? File paths + behavior, not full code.

## Alternatives considered
(optional) Other approaches you weighed and why this one won.

## Out of scope
(optional) Things you are NOT proposing — helps reviewers stay focused.
